# anyscale_policy_bindings (Data Source)

**BETA FEATURE**: Use this data source to retrieve a list of all policy bindings for a specific resource type in your organization. Policy bindings define which user groups have which roles on resources. This is part of the SCIM provisioning feature.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `resource_type` (String) The type of resources to list policies for. Must be `clouds` or `projects`.

### Read-Only

- `policies` (Attributes List) List of policy bindings for the specified resource type. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--policies))

<a id="nestedatt--policies"></a>
### Nested Schema for `policies`

Read-Only:

- `bindings` (Attributes List) List of role bindings for this resource. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--policies--bindings))
- `resource_id` (String) The ID of the resource (cloud or project).
- `resource_type` (String) The type of the resource (cloud or project).
- `sync_status` (String) The synchronization status of the policy (e.g., success, pending, failed).

<a id="nestedatt--policies--bindings"></a>
### Nested Schema for `policies.bindings`

Read-Only:

- `principals` (List of String) List of user group IDs assigned to this role.
- `role_name` (String) The name of the role (e.g., owner, write, readonly).
